channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish, 6th July
item.description:
2 x bed bases (first reported last Tuesday) joined by foam mattresses and rubbish (some showing an address). Fire hazard and blocking street for disabled etc. Van has been by at least twice today and failed to removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartville Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle parked completely on the pavement, 6th July
item.description:
Car parked completely on the pavement causing an obstruction to pedestrians. By the green outside of flats on Stelling road opposite Londonderry Parade.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stelling Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Close to 218 Holly Lodge Mansions, 6th July
item.description:
Tenant called complaining about trees along the east side of her property touching her windows.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakeshott Avenue, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New flower beds outside library and bus stop, 6th July
item.description:
The new flower beds on the newly laid road outside the library have not been planted and the weeds are now about 4 foot height. It appears the other flower beds at the bottom of this hill outside the college have been planted and are being maintained. Has anyone been instructed to plant dnd manage these plant beds ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Continually Dumped In The Street, 6th July
item.description:
Rubbish, including furniture and household waste, constantly dumped in the street by Plough bus stop. The rubbish invariably spills ut of the bags and attracted flies and rodents. It's a hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 352-356, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on street, 6th July
item.description:
Two flats above Cribbs funeral services do not have a communal bin and are leaving their rubbish here. Please can you do something about it?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Laurel Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes dumped in middle of the road by lime bike operative, 6th July
item.description:
A lime van has just dumped some lime bikes in the middle of the road rather than putting them in the cycle parking area. 5:05pm Monday 6th July.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northchurch Terrace, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basal growth - separation on council officer instruction, 6th July
item.description:
Basal growth - risk to car drivers' views - previously reported but not actioned due council rules of one tree per report....

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 6th July
item.description:
Vehicle has been abandoned for some months (at least two) in a parking bay on Stephenson close. Received multiple parking tickets and now has profanity and hateful symbols etched into the accumulated dust

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stephenson Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicule Rear of Cator Road, 6th July
item.description:
This vehicule has been here for quite some time. A notice was left on the vehicule with no response back. I will be placing hoardings by the end of the week to begin works on my land.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall and door, 6th July
item.description:
Graffiti on wall and door of utility building

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timber Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicule Rear of Cator Road, 6th July
item.description:
This vehicule has been here for quite some time. A notice was left on the vehicule with no response back. I will be placing hoardings by the end of the week to begin works on my land.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th July
item.description:
Hello, no. 29 has a number of people living there in temporary accommodation. Whenever someone moves out they dump a load of rubbish on the road and in the front porch. I have to clean this up continually as no one else does it (I don’t even live there).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pile of rubbish and toys, 6th July
item.description:
Dumped pile of rubbish and toys.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alvey Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front of westbere house , overhanging privet hedge, 6th July
item.description:
Overhanging privet bush ,needs cutting back ,as residents in wheelchair can't get through ,one even falling in road ,needs action

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicule Rear of Cator Road, 6th July
item.description:
This vehicule has been here for quite some time. A notice was left on the vehicule with no response back. I will be placing hoardings by the end of the week to begin works on my land.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale, Greater London

item.title: Dumped beds, 6th July
item.description:
The bed advised as fixed is still here and others added to it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sedan Way, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basal growth previously reported but not actioned, 6th July
item.description:
Individual tree reports as dictated by council officer

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
